title: Ahalaxy's Vanilla+
description: The Enhanced Vanilla Modpack used on the Ahalaxy Server
body: # Ahalaxy's Vanilla+ *(Yes, I know the title screen has a typo and that the apostrophy in `it's` is an absolute atrocity, but I can't be bothered fixing it right now, lol)* ### The Enhanced Vanilla Modpack used on the Ahalaxy Server This Modpack is the Pack we use on our Server to enhance the Vanilla experience in all the right ways. It adds everything from crucial performance fixes, to better visuals and quality of life changes with the main focus always being that the pack is entirely optional. ### PATCHES #### Just Released: - 3.2 - Visual Patch - 3.3 - Social Patch - 4.0 - Sound Patch (And move to 1.20.4 Quilt) #### Next Patches: - 4.1 - Unknown
